purpose: Signals the sales assistant can infer from quote data, customer notes, transcripts, debriefs, and prior actions. These are not fixed personas; multiple signals can be active at once.

signal_format.name: Human-readable label.
signal_format.language_clues: Customer words or paraphrases that may indicate the signal.
signal_format.behavior_clues: Timing or workflow clues that may indicate the signal.
signal_format.confidence_notes: How strongly the signal can be inferred.
signal_format.related_objections: Objections commonly connected to this signal.
signal_format.task_fit: Relative fit of the five demo task types.
signal_format.mistakes_to_avoid: How the assistant can misuse the signal.
